TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: kawas tay 1986, ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 8, Andray Blatche, squliq na p'unro. pinqbaqan nya Andray Blatche mqwas biru sa Henninger pqwsan biru seneng. qnxan nya Angela Oliver hiya' ga, yaya' ni Andray Blatche. mintzyuwaw nya Andray Blatche hiya ga senmong pgnaw' mari' NBA. maki sa kawas 2005, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, an*raj βlatʦ~ʨħe, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. pinqβaqan nja an*raj βlatʦ~ʨħe mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa ħenniŋer pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ. qnxan nja aŋela oli*er ħijaʔ ɣa, jajaʔ ni an*raj βlatʦ~ʨħe. mintzjuwaw nja an*raj βlatʦ~ʨħe ħija ɣa s~ɕenmoŋ pɣnawʔ mariʔ nβa. maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na nβa. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: kawas tay 1986, ryax sa tay 22 nqu tay 8, Andray Blatche, squliq na p'unro. pinqbaqan nya Andray Blatche mqwas biru sa Henninger pqwsan biru seneng. qnxan nya Angela Oliver hiya' ga, yaya' ni Andray Blatche. mintzyuwaw nya Andray Blatche hiya ga senmong pgnaw' mari' NBA. maki sa kawas 2005, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na NBA. pincyuwagan nya' pspngan mari sa may yugal yacing masuq mspung mari sa pspngan mari na maycyugal byacing lga cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, an*raj βlatʦ~ʨħe, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. pinqβaqan nja an*raj βlatʦ~ʨħe mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa ħenniŋer pqws~ɕan βiru s~ɕeneŋ. qnxan nja aŋela oli*er ħijaʔ ɣa, jajaʔ ni an*raj βlatʦ~ʨħe. mintzjuwaw nja an*raj βlatʦ~ʨħe ħija ɣa s~ɕenmoŋ pɣnawʔ mariʔ nβa. maki s~ɕa kawas~ɕ ****, tʔariŋ mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na nβa. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ ps~ɕpŋan mari s~ɕa maj juɣal jaʦ~ʨiŋ mas~ɕuq ms~ɕpuŋ mari s~ɕa ps~ɕpŋan mari na majʦ~ʨjuɣal βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
